ddls:
CREATE TABLE "software_reviews" (
  "uuid" TEXT /* Unique identifier for the review */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the company that produced the software */,
  "software_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the software being reviewed */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the review */,
  "url" TEXT /* URL where the review is published */,
  "author_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the author of the review */,
  "date_published" TEXT /* Date the review was published */,
  "review_status" TEXT /* Status of the review (e.g., published, pending, rejected) */,
  "review_score" REAL /* Overall score of the review */,
  "review_updated_at" TEXT /* Date the review was last updated */,
  "other1" INTEGER /* Additional metadata field 1 */,
  "other2" INTEGER /* Additional metadata field 2 */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("uuid"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_software_reviews_software_id FOREIGN KEY ("software_id") REFERENCES software_products ("software_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_software_reviews_company_id FOREIGN KEY ("company_id") REFERENCES companies ("company_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_software_reviews_author_id FOREIGN KEY ("author_id") REFERENCES authors ("author_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "companies" (
  "company_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each company */,
  "company_name" TEXT /* Name of the company */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the company */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the company */,
  "company_website" TEXT /* Company website URL */,
  "company_phone" TEXT /* Company phone number */,
  "company_address" TEXT /* Company physical address */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "software_products" (
  "software_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each software product */,
  "software_name" TEXT /* Name of the software product */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the category the software belongs to */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the software product */,
  "software_website" TEXT /* Software product website URL */,
  "software_description_long" TEXT /* Detailed description of the software product */,
  "software_features" TEXT /* Key features of the software product */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("software_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "authors" (
  "author_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each author */,
  "author_name" TEXT /* Name of the author */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the author */,
  "affiliation" TEXT /* Affiliation of the author */,
  "author_bio" TEXT /* Brief biography of the author */,
  "author_expertise" TEXT /* Author's areas of expertise */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("author_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., reviewer, admin) */,
  "user_avatar" TEXT /* User's profile picture */,
  "user_background" TEXT /* User's background information (e.g., occupation, interests) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role FOREIGN KEY ("role") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "uuid" TEXT /* Reference to the review being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the review */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the review was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "access_device" TEXT /* Device used to access the review (e.g., desktop, mobile) */,
  "access_browser" TEXT /* Browser used to access the review */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_uuid FOREIGN KEY ("uuid") REFERENCES software_reviews ("uuid")
)

CREATE TABLE "ratings" (
  "rating_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rating */,
  "software_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the software being rated */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who provided the rating */,
  "rating_value" REAL /* Value of the rating */,
  "rating_date" TEXT /* Date the rating was provided */,
  "rating_reason" TEXT /* Reason behind the user's rating (e.g., easy to use, feature-rich) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rating_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ratings_software_id FOREIGN KEY ("software_id") REFERENCES software_products ("software_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ratings_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "software_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the software the comment is about */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who provided the comment */,
  "comment_text" TEXT /* Text of the comment */,
  "comment_date" TEXT /* Date the comment was provided */,
  "comment_reply_to" INTEGER /* ID of the comment being replied to (to support threaded conversations) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_software_id FOREIGN KEY ("software_id") REFERENCES software_products ("software_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reviews_metadata" (
  "metadata_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metadata entry */,
  "uuid" TEXT /* Reference to the review the metadata is associated with */,
  "metadata_type" TEXT /* Type of metadata (e.g., tags, source) */,
  "metadata_value" TEXT /* Value of the metadata */,
  "metadata_source" TEXT /* Source of the metadata (e.g., user input, automated tagging) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metadata_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_metadata_uuid FOREIGN KEY ("uuid") REFERENCES software_reviews ("uuid")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "software_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each software version */,
  "software_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the software the version belongs to */,
  "version_number" TEXT /* Version number of the software */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Date the version was released */,
  "version_changelog" TEXT /* Changelog for the software version */,
  "version_deprecated" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the software version is deprecated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_software_versions_software_id FOREIGN KEY ("software_id") REFERENCES software_products ("software_id")
)
